features: LASTING FRAGRANCE: Swirl In Wash Laundry Fragrance Booster, will add a long lasting Lavender Bouquet fragrance boost to your laundry. Suitable for all fabrics, colours, load sizes and washes. Single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes using the measuring cap provided.

READY TO USE: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Lavender Bouquet fragrance in each laundry load
SLOW RELEASE: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, developed to start releasing a fresh Lavender Bouquet scent at the start of the wash. Choose the amount of crystals to increase the scent depth
LAUNDRY FRESH: Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, perfect to add to seasonal laundry before storing away. Great for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Swirl Laundry Lavender Bouquet Fragrance Booster, ready to use, 350g resealable container
description: Product Description Swirl In Wash Laundry Fragrance Booster, will add a long lasting Lavender Bouquet fragrance boost to your laundry. Suitable for all fabrics, colours , load sizes and washes. Single unit provides fragrance for 16 washes. Swirl Laundry Fragrance Booster, add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. Enjoy the long lasting Lavender Bouquet fragrance in each laundry load. Perfect to add to seasonal laundry before storing away. Great for freshening sleeping bags, bedding, towels and sportswear. Shop Amazon.co.uk for the Swirl range of laundry products. Swirl Laundry Lavender Bouquet Fragrance Booster, ready to use, 350g resealable container Ingredients Perfume, Coumarin, Eugenol, Geraniol, Benzyl Benzoate, Linalool, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone. Directions Add crystals directly into the empty washing machine drum, add usual washing detergent, fabric conditioner if using and laundry booster, select preferred washing cycle. See more
